description: Expected findings for anti-IL-17 monoclonal antibodies (secukinumab, ixekizumab, brodalumab). IL-17 drives neutrophil recruitment and anti-fungal defense at mucosal barriers. Blockade produces modest immunomodulatory effects. Cynomolgus monkey is the typical species. Inherits Fc-mediated base findings from general_mab.

expected_findings.typical_magnitude: Mild; typically remains in normal range
expected_findings.rationale: IL-17 promotes neutrophil survival and recruitment; mild reduction expected with blockade.
IL-17 blockade reduces neutrophil-driven mucosal inflammation — expected PD effect.
